prose.en: Providers MUST NOT use a third party to apply for a FedRAMP Certification on their behalf; this includes independent assessment services.

en: FedRAMP previously allowed independent assessment services to submit applications on behalf of providers, but this caused confusion about who was responsible for the application and the information in it. Providers should apply directly to ensure clear accountability.
Providers may use third parties to help them prepare their application and assessment materials for submission.
